sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { PlusCircleIcon, ClockIcon, CheckCircleIcon, MapPinIcon, ChartBarIcon, ExclamationTriangleIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const Dashboard = () => { const stats = [ { name: 'Total Complaints', value: '24', icon: ClockIcon, color: 'bg-blue-500' }, { name: 'Resolved', value: '18', icon: CheckCircleIcon, color: 'bg-green-500' }, { name: 'Pending', value: '6', icon: ExclamationTriangleIcon, color: 'bg-yellow-500' }, { name: 'Hotspots Nearby', value: '3', icon: MapPinIcon, color: 'bg-red-500' } ]; const recentComplaints = [ { id: 1, title: 'Street Light Not Working', category: 'Infrastructure', status: 'Pending', date: '2024-01-20' }, { id: 2, title: 'Garbage Collection Issue', category: 'Sanitation', status: 'Resolved', date: '2024-01-19' }, { id: 3, title: 'Water Leakage', category: 'Water Supply', status: 'In Progress', date: '2024-01-18' } ]; const quickActions = [ { name: 'Submit Complaint', description: 'Report a new issue in your area', icon: PlusCircleIcon, link: '/submit-complaint', color: 'bg-blue-600' }, { name: 'View History', description: 'Check status of previous complaints', icon: ClockIcon, link: '/complaint-history', color: 'bg-green-600' }, { name: 'Analytics', description: 'View community insights and trends', icon: ChartBarIcon, link: '/analytics', color: 'bg-purple-600' } ]; return (
{/* Navigation */}
Urban Insights
Dashboard History
{/* Welcome Section */}

Welcome back, User!

Here's what's happening in your community today.

{/* Stats Grid */}
{stats.map((stat) => (
{stat.name}
{stat.value}
))}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions

{quickActions.map((action) => (

{action.name}

{action.description}

))}
{/* Recent Complaints */}

Recent Complaints

    {recentComplaints.map((complaint) => (
  • {complaint.id}

    {complaint.title}

    {complaint.category} • {complaint.date}

    {complaint.status}
    • ))}
View all complaints
{/* Community Insights */}

Community Insights

Most Reported Issue

Street Lighting

32% of all complaints this month

Fastest Resolution

Garbage Collection

Average 24 hours resolution time

Attention Needed

Water Supply

5 pending complaints in your area

); }; export default Dashboard;
